title: 2 Pairs Anti Slip Dog Socks, Dog Paw Protectors with Adjustable Strap, Walking Boots for Injured Paws, Dog Socks Paws Stop Licking, Senior Dogs for Indoor Outdoor Hardwood Floor Walking (M)
features: 【Size Type】M, paw width 6.6cm/2.6 inches, sock length 16cm/6.3 inches. To ensure a perfect fit, please measure your pet's paws before purchase. If your dog is a large breed, we recommend choosing a larger size. This set includes 2 pairs of dog socks with adjustable Velcro, made of elastic cotton and high-quality silicone, which are comfortable and flexible.

【Enhanced Traction】There are silicone patterns on all four sides, which will not deform even if twisted. Excellent anti-slip effect. It can effectively prevent licking paws and make it easier to recover after injury. Anti-slip dog socks can also protect furniture and floors from scratches.

【Soft and Durable Material】These socks are designed for the comfort and activity of senior dogs and puppies, with durable fabrics, excellent elasticity and comfort, while keeping the dog's paws warm and protected from sharp objects.

【Adjustable Straps for Safety】The upgraded version of the dog socks is equipped with adjustable and removable sticky straps, which are easy to put on and take off, can fit your dog's paws tightly, ensure that the socks will not slip off, prevent dogs from tripping, and effectively protect paws in various situations.

【Multi-purpose Use】Available in a variety of sizes, suitable for small, medium, large and senior dogs, our dog socks provide a versatile solution for paw protection, protecting dogs from hot/cold surfaces, preventing scratches on furniture and floors, and keeping paws free from outdoor dirt. Dog socks are also great birthday gifts for dog lovers.
description: Features: Function: used to protect dog paws Material: silicone, cotton Color: black Size: XS, S, M, L, XL Packing list: 2 pairs of non-slip dog socks Applicable scope: suitable for small, medium, large and elderly dogs Note: None
